n: Instance: Into Darkness Falls A Star

steps.t: You should speak to Harthalín. You and your companion, Harthalín, have marched in the Last Alliance for years under the command of High King Gil-galad…
High King Gil-galad is standing outside the rear garrison upon the Dagorlad. You have stood fast before the Gwetherain, and the High King now wishes t…
The forward garrison lies across the flaming trenches of the Enemy to the south of the rear garrison. The High King has asked you to scout the forward…
Dernaith and Megoril can be found at the forward garrison upon the Dagorlad. You have found two of the Spears of Lindon, but you have not found Thelar…
Elrond can be found in the webbed vale to the west of the forward garrison. You, Elrond, and Glorfindel have repelled the terrible spawn of Ungwetári …
The Alliance has come to the forward garrison upon the Dagorlad. Elrond Halfelven has brought word of the Alliance's advance, and High King Gil-galad …
High King Gil-galad can be found at the forward garrison upon the Dagorlad. You have arrived to find the Alliance gathered at the forward garrison. Yo…
Slégar the Crafty can be found at the forward garrison upon the Dagorlad. High King Gil-galad has sent you upon a two-fold mission: to provide a distr…
Barrels of black powder can be found to the east of the forward garrison upon the Dagorlad. Slégar the Crafty has asked you to find what remains of th…
You should seek any sign of the Gwatharan's passing and follow his path. You have provided the distraction needed by the Alliance. You should now seek…
Harthalín can be found with her company beyond the eastern trenches upon the Dagorlad. You have discovered Harthalín and her company while searching f…
Harthalín can be found with her company beyond the eastern trenches upon the Dagorlad. You have learned that the Witch-king himself took Thelaron, and…
The Easterling encampment lies far to the east of the forward garrison. Harthalín has led you to the far end of the Easterling encampment, and you sho…
Harthalín can be found at your bedside in Tham Send in the Last Homely House. You have awoken from your encounter with the Witch-king within the haven…
You have endured great suffering as a result of the wound dealt to you by the Witch-king. You should continue resting until you are fully healed.
Elrond Halfelven can be found within Tham Send in the Last Homely House. You have found Elrond, and you should now speak with him.
Hithgol can be found in one of the beds in Tham Send in the Last Homely House. Hithgol, the warrior and herbalist who once aided Prince Amroth, sustai…
Elrond has given you leave to travel to Celondim in preparation to sail to the havens of Mithlond, but you shall have need of supplies for your journe…
